item.title: Why is Unjha Formulations Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 29-Apr, Unjha Formulations Ltd witnessed a notable recovery in its share price, rising by 5.52% to close at ₹22.00 after three consecutive days of decline. This rebound comes despite an initial gap down at the market open, reflecting a volatile trading session marked by heightened investor interest and mixed technical signals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Has Varun Beverages Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Varun Beverages Ltd has declared a dividend of 25% (0.5 per share) with an ex-date of April 30, 2026. The company has demonstrated strong total returns over the long term, particularly with a 272.27% return over the last 4 years and 547.4% over the last 5 years. Time: Apr 29 2026 11:30 PM IST
